meaning: n.大剪刀,快速帆船修剪者
examples: This summer, clipper cut is preferred by many men.
The shorter clipper gauge will allow the hair to be trimmed closer to the scalp.
Schooners and clipper ships sped to Buenos Aires and Kingston, Melbourne and Singapore.
This year the third generation Clipper 70 ocean racing yacht will participate in the race.
London will be the start and finish line for the Clipper Round the World Yacht Race.
